message:
feat(tui): responsive visibility policy for controls and hints (1mfw3.4.3)

Add VisibilityPolicy struct controlling theme-in-title, footer hint slots,
hint budget, and saved-view path truncation per breakpoint. Refactor
footer_hint_slots/budget to delegate through visibility_policy() instead of
raw width thresholds. Remove unused FOOTER_HINT_*_MIN_WIDTH constants.
Search bar title now uses policy for theme name visibility.
6 new tests, 1 test updated for new breakpoint alignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
